sys_script_include.description: Server-side helper for the unauthenticated Experience Portal. Provides submitCase(payload) for anonymous case submission and lookupCase(number) for anonymous status lookup. Enforces strict field whitelisting per AAP Section 0.7.4: submission accepts only subject, type, description, requester_name, requester_email and forces status=Draft regardless of payload; lookup returns only status, subject, opened_date and never exposes internal fields. submitCase returns {number} on success or {error} on failure; lookupCase returns the whitelisted record on match or null on no-match (the calling scripted REST endpoint translates null into the HTTP 404 not-found response whose verbatim body is specified by AAP Section 0.7.4). Replaces the persistence and lookup roles of ArkCase SaveCaseService and GetCaseByNumberService for the portal slice. Contains zero gs.eventQueue() calls per the email-disabled constraint and zero hardcoded sys_id reference literals.
sys_script_include.name: CasePortalService
